claim: Observed Self correlation is usually lower than PP correlation
scope: single author; author says no theory
local_validation_method: Paired sample by identical profile and observation date; compute ordering rate and confidence interval

claim: Observed PP correlation is usually lower than Prod correlation
scope: single author; author says no theory
local_validation_method: Paired sample by identical profile and observation date; calculate mismatch and reversal rate
Compare funnel recall against authorized Prod outcomes with thresholds marked pending

claim: Displayed Prod-related failure may have PP-path context
scope: reported PP submission path; message semantics unverified
local_validation_method: Obtain official error taxonomy and classify consented test records without automatic action

claim: PP and Prod may both change after a scoped research change without establishing an ordering
scope: one practitioner case plus divergent comments
local_validation_method: Record paired PP/Prod values and quality outcome for one-change experiments
notes: No formula, result number, or profile is published.

claim: Correlation observations can become stale before a later check
local_validation_method: Version cache by observation time and invalidate on defined profile/pool changes
notes: Does not establish a refresh interval.

claim: HTTP rate-limit feedback and compute-side delay are distinct
local_validation_method: Keep server-throttle and pending/unavailable as separate state classes; validate scope before configuration
notes: No numeric limit or retry interval is adopted.

claim: Within-batch correlation can expose redundant candidate families
scope: one forum workflow; threshold and PnL details excluded
local_validation_method: Compare clustering sensitivity with held-out local batches and retain every candidate provenance
notes: Advisory diversity triage only; not a platform correlation or admission rule.

claim: Changing a data-family hypothesis may alter correlation outcomes more than local operator variation
local_validation_method: Run controlled one-family changes under a fixed local profile and evaluate quality plus correlation state
notes: No score, threshold, field, formula or general causal rule retained.

claim: Tag-derived local pool membership can be stale or differ from another membership cue
scope: forum code discussion; authoritative semantics unavailable
local_validation_method: Compare consented local prechecks to authorized observations and log pool identity plus observed-at time
notes: Source code and private pool data are excluded; never use a local result as submission authority.

claim: Self and Power Pool observations can diverge
scope: single practitioner report; terminology and metric definition are not authoritative
local_validation_method: Build a paired observation matrix by identical profile and observation date; measure mismatches, reversals and missingness
notes: Counterexample only. It does not establish official metric semantics, an ordering rule or a threshold.

claim: A reported local Self and PPAC-style observation did not match the proposed monotonic funnel
scope: single direct-access practitioner report; scope and metric semantics are not authoritative
local_validation_method: Collect paired authorized observations with identical profile and observed-at metadata; measure ordering and reversal rates
notes: Counterexample only. Source code and private output are non-adoptable; no official metric definition or cutoff follows.

claim: A signature cache is proposed to predict later high correlation
scope: single implementation proposal; no paired outcome
local_validation_method: Evaluate held-out precision, recall, and freshness decay under identical scope; separately compare Self, Power Pool, and Prod observations
notes: It is not evidence that field or operator overlap predicts an official correlation metric or supports rejection.

claim: Distinct economic hypotheses may be associated with lower correlation
scope: single author; causal and predictive claim unverified
local_validation_method: Pre-register mechanism labels for a private matched study; compare scope-matched authorized observations while measuring reversals and drawdown co-movement
notes: Hypothesis only. It does not establish an official correlation metric, a causal mechanism, a threshold, or a screening rule.

claim: A local correlation graph can group redundant research variants
scope: one code-bearing community tool; platform semantics unavailable
local_validation_method: Assess graph stability across windows, missingness treatment, and clustering choices; retain all candidates and compare reviewer decisions
notes: Advisory triage only. Local graph edges do not represent Self, Power Pool, Prod, or a rejection criterion.
